vocab.meaning: làm giảm bớt sự buồn chán
vocab.example: To alleviate the boredom of sitting in stationary traffic, I often listen to educational audiobooks.

vocab.meaning: giao thông ngắt quãng (nhích từng chút một)
vocab.example: Dealing with stop-and-go traffic is exhausting, so I try to focus on deep breathing exercises to stay relaxed.

vocab.meaning: kiềm chế sự giận dữ khi lái xe
vocab.example: Listening to classical music helps me curb road rage when other drivers start acting aggressively in a jam.

vocab.meaning: việc đi lại với tốc độ chậm như sên
vocab.example: During a snail-paced commute, I find it useful to mentally plan my chores for the upcoming weekend.
I try to harness the time spent in congestion by making hands-free calls to catch up with my relatives.

vocab.meaning: sự tương phản hoàn toàn với
vocab.example: The stillness of being stuck in a jam is a stark contrast to the usual fast-paced nature of my workday.

vocab.meaning: lượng xe cộ đổ về rất lớn
vocab.example: Due to the heavy influx of vehicles during rush hour, I've learned to just accept the delay as inevitable.

vocab.meaning: kiểm soát mức độ căng thẳng
vocab.example: I usually play some upbeat jazz to keep my stress levels in check when the road ahead is completely blocked.

vocab.meaning: thử thách lòng kiên nhẫn của ai đó
vocab.example: Being stuck behind a long line of buses really tests my patience, but I try to remain as composed as possible.

vocab.meaning: một việc làm vô ích/không có kết quả
vocab.example: Complaining about the traffic is an exercise in futility, so I prefer to lose myself in a good playlist instead.
